    #2026-05-09

    #요약 (AI 작성)

    ohah/zntc에서 대규모 모듈 분리 리팩토링이 진행되었다. transformer, codegen, graph, decorator 관련 헬퍼와 노드 dispatch, visitor, control-flow 등이 각각 독립된 모듈로 분리되어 코드 구조를 개선했다. 이와 함께 NAPI 결과 처리, 심볼 바운드 런타임 helper 참조, bundler runtime helper canonical_name 보존 등 버그 수정도 병행되었다. ohah/ohah.github.io에서는 CRON_CRD_WRITE.md 관련 크론 작업이 완료되어 30분마다 수행되는 맞춤법 교정 크론이 정상 작동한다.

    #커밋

    #ohah/ohah.github.io

    • cron: mark CRON_CRD_WRITE.md task as complete (2026-05-09 10:00 KST)
    • Cron task: CRON_CRD_WRITE.md verified, no spelling errors (2026-05-09 17:00 KST)
    • cron: mark CRON_CRD_WRITE.md itself as verified (2026-05-09 17:00 KST)
    • docs: CRON_CRD_WRITE.md final status verified (2026-05-09 11:00 KST)
    • docs: cron-crd-write - 2026-05-09 13:30 KST - all tasks complete, no remaining files to check
    • cron: mark CRON_CRD_WRITE.md as completed at 2026-05-09 14:00 KST
    • docs: mark 2026-05-09 cron task completed
    • docs: update today-commit meta - add 2026-05-09 entry

    #ohah/zntc

    • test(core): split browserslist runtime tests
    • test(core): build 테스트 파일 분리
    • refactor(core): split graph synthetic imports
    • refactor(core): split napi options parsing
    • fix(monorepo): /simplify polish — docs anchor, source field note, vite-plugin exclude
    • feat(monorepo): adopt source exports condition + vite-plugin publish-ready
    • fix(monorepo): move @zntc/server to devDependencies in web/RN
    • refactor: split transformer import export helpers
    • fix(wasm): emit dts + extend tsconfig.base + fix latent type errors
    • fix(transformer): propagate async marker to _loop closure (capture + body await)
    • refactor: split transformer tagged template helpers
    • refactor: split transformer regex helpers
    • test(transformer): expand for-of/for-in capture coverage + remove redundant init
    • fix(ts): /simplify polish — IDE.md contributor note + getter Readonly<...>
    • feat(ts): enable isolatedDeclarations on tsconfig.base.json
    • fix(monorepo): cumulative review fixes — build:publishable / server refs / IDE docs
    • refactor: split napi profile callbacks
    • refactor(scripts): extract scripts/lib/workspace.ts helper (4 script dedup)
    • refactor: split graph asset source helpers
    • refactor: split graph package side effects helpers
    • refactor: split graph parse helpers
    • ci(release): add release.ts (dry-run 우선, --publish + confirm 후 실제 publish)
    • refactor: split transformer namespace helpers
    • ci(publish): publishable deps version consistency check
    • ci: add sherif (workspace metadata 일관성) + fix vite-plugin peer 누락
    • docs: add IDE setup guide for TS Project References
    • test(transformer): expand async edge cases for for-of/for-loop _loop wrap
    • refactor: split transformer define helpers
    • refactor: split napi tsconfig cache helpers
    • refactor: split transformer filter helpers
    • ci: publish install test — 실제 npm install + dynamic import 검증
    • refactor: split transformer flow helpers
    • ci(publish): add prepublishOnly + pre-release-check + PUBLISH.md
    • fix(bundler): keep runtime helper imports out of deconflict
    • refactor: split napi benchmark callback
    • fix(transformer): isFunctionBoundary 에 method_definition 추가
    • refactor: split transformer options
    • refactor: split graph plugin and state types
    • refactor: split codegen type runtime emission
    • refactor: split codegen binding helpers
    • refactor: split codegen statement helpers
    • refactor: split transformer control flow helpers

    #PR (해당일 생성/머지)

    repo#상태제목
    ohah/zntc#2882mergedrefactor: graph discovery scan 분리
    ohah/zntc#2881mergedrefactor: graph parse module 분리
    ohah/zntc#2880mergedrefactor: transformer node dispatch 분리
    ohah/zntc#2879mergedrefactor: stage3 decorator transform 분리
    ohah/zntc#2878mergedrefactor: class visit 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2877mergedfix(transformer,semantic): symbol-bound runtime helper reference (#2869)
    ohah/zntc#2876mergedrefactor: transformer visitor 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2875mergedrefactor: codegen expression 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2874mergedrefactor: NAPI result 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2873mergedrefactor: graph cycle 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2872mergedrefactor: codegen debug metadata 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2871mergedrefactor: codegen writer 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2870mergedrefactor: legacy decorator 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2867mergedrefactor: transformer driver 분리
    ohah/zntc#2866mergedfix(bundler): runtime helper canonical_name 보존 (es5-rn __extends$1 is not defined)
    ohah/zntc#2865mergedrefactor: graph 헬퍼 모듈 분리
    ohah/zntc#2864mergedrefactor: class member 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2863mergedrefactor: stage3 decorator 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2862mergedrefactor: decorator metadata 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2861mergedfix(server): HMR_MSG / HMR_RN_MSG runtime freeze
    ohah/zntc#2860mergedrefactor: transformer node helper 분리
    ohah/zntc#2859mergedfix(bundler): .cjs 를 script mode 로 정렬 + .cts 는 module 일관 유지
    ohah/zntc#2858mergedrefactor: graph parser metadata 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2857mergedrefactor: graph plugin hook 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2856mergedrefactor: graph parser setup 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2855mergedrefactor: graph json 모듈 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2854mergedrefactor: graph package context 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2853mergedfix(parser): .js/.jsx 도 ESM 으로 파싱 (esbuild/swc/rollup 정렬)
    ohah/zntc#2852mergedrefactor: graph loader diagnostics 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2851mergedrefactor: transformer list 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2850mergedrefactor: transformer member 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2849mergedrefactor: transformer control-flow 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2848mergedrefactor: codegen statement 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2847mergedrefactor: codegen binding 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2846mergedrefactor: codegen call 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2845mergedrefactor: graph finalize 패스 분리
    ohah/zntc#2844mergedrefactor: transformer declarations 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2843mergedrefactor: graph transform prepass 분리
    ohah/zntc#2842mergeddocs: update ZNTC expansion wording
    ohah/zntc#2841mergedrefactor: codegen type runtime emission 분리
    ohah/zntc#2840mergedfeat(rspack-loader): @zntc/rspack-loader 신규 패키지
    ohah/zntc#2839mergedrefactor: codegen module emission 분리
    ohah/zntc#2838mergedrefactor: graph requested exports 헬퍼 확장
    ohah/zntc#2837mergedrefactor: graph runtime/request 헬퍼 분리
    ohah/zntc#2836mergedrefactor: graph plugin과 state 타입 분리
    ohah/zntc#2835mergedfix(examples): Expo Rozenite DevTools 적용
    ohah/zntc#2834mergedrefactor: transformer options 타입 분리
    ohah/zntc#2833mergedci(release): introduce @changesets/cli for version bump + changelog
    ohah/zntc#2832mergedrefactor: transformer runtime helper bitset 분리
    ohah/zntc#2831mergedrefactor: codegen options 타입 분리
